subject: New Request: Software Engineer
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the telecom/media sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a lead Software Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • Cassandra
  • LangChain

Details:
Client: NordCast
Start: ASAP
Duration: 12 months
Location: TBD
Rate: up to 1175 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Anna Berg
Senior Recruitment Consultant
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 72 123 45 67
